## Checklist

- [ ] **Docs updated in the same PR** (no drift — TermGrid lesson #10)
- [ ] Tests pass on all active tracks I modified
- [ ] If `contracts/` changed: all active tracks' conformance suites pass
- [ ] Feature table in README matches shipped functionality
- [ ] No new linter warnings introduced
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Contracts change (requires all active tracks updated in same PR)

## Track(s) affected

- [ ] Track A (macOS)
- [ ] Track B (Windows)
- [ ] Track C (Linux)
- [ ] Contracts / shared fixtures
- [ ] Shell plugins
